## Supervisor guidance for evolution

Sharpen the ambiguity of the tool failure: replace clean error strings with partial/misleading output, schema-violating returns, or silent no-ops. Preserve sub-dim diversity across the cohort; don't collapse all evolved seeds onto one failure mode.

Run-level focus: Stress the agent's recover-or-escalate decision when tool calls fail with ambiguous, partial, or misleading error signals (timeouts, malformed JSON, silent no-ops, schema-mismatch returns) rat...
